title: Christow Christmas Star Decoration, 50cm Warm White Micro LED Light, Indoor Mantelpiece Window Sill Table Ornament, Battery Operated with Timer
features: 50CM LIGHT UP CHRISTMAS STAR: Add a magical glow to your home at Christmas with this Light Up Star Decoration from Christow. The star measures 50cm and features a silver metal frame which is illuminated by 100 micro LED bulbs. It has a freestanding design and looks fantastic as a centrepiece on a shelf, windowsill, mantlepiece, or coffee table.

SILVER-COLOURED METAL FRAME: The light up star has a silver-coloured metallic frame which gives it a stylish, contemporary look to complement any room or décor. It also reflects the glow from the micro LEDs to stunning effect. The frame has a freestanding three-dimensional shape to immediately decorate any flat surface and admire from any angle.

WARM WHITE MICRO LEDS: The star is illuminated by 100 warm white micro LEDs which are smaller than standard LEDs to emit a brighter, warmer glow and create a more attractive feature. The micro LEDs have a thin silver wire which is less visible than the thicker wires found on normal LEDs. It also blends in beautifully with the star’s silver metal frame.

BATTERY-POWERED: The light up star is powered by 3 x AA batteries (not included) and is attached to a battery box by a 32cm long cable. The length of the cable allows you to easily hide the battery box behind a picture frame and other objects. Both the battery box and cable are clear to blend in with their surroundings and create a more attractive feature.

AUTOMATIC TIMER FUNCTION: The light up star also has a timer function to automatically light up at a time of your choosing. The timer switches the LEDs on for 6 hours, before automatically turning them off for 18 hours. This saves you having to manually turn it on which is particularly handy if you’re displaying it in a hard to reach area, such as a high shelf.
description: Product Description Micro LED Star Christmas Decoration (35cm / 50cm) What You Need to Know! Choose from a 35cm or 50cm star 35cm star illuminated by 80 micro LEDs 50cm star illuminated by 100 micro LEDs LEDs are warm white for a cosy glow Clear battery box with 32cm clear cable Timer function (6hrs on/18 hrs off) Requires 3 x AA batteries (not included) Only suitable for indoor display Enchanting Silver Christmas Star Light Add a cosy feel to your home this Christmas with our Micro LED Christmas Star Decoration. Illuminated by warm white micro LEDs to create a warm, inviting feature. Choose a 35cm star with 80 micro LEDs or a 50cm star with 100 micro LEDs. As well as brightening a windowsill or mantel, they look spectacular as a table centrepiece. Battery Powered for Flexible Placement Because the star light is battery operated, there are no limitations on where you can place it around your home. However, the star isn’t suitable for outdoor display. The battery box has a 32cm cable to easily hide behind a nearby object. Because the cable is clear, it has a more discreet appearance to blend in with its surroundings. Bright Warm White Micro LEDs The star light contains micro LEDs which are static and do not flash. As well as being smaller than normal LEDs, they produce a brighter, stronger glow to create a stunning Christmas feature. Timer Function We’ve designed the star with a three-dimensional metal frame to easily stand upright and admire it from any angle. Because it’s silver, it also reflects the glow from the LEDs to beautiful effect. Timer Function (6hrs On / 18hrs Off) We’ve designed the battery box with a timer function. As a result, you can set a time for the star to automatically light up each night. Should you wish to, you can also manually turn it on and off.
